creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: romain
Date: Sun Jun  5 16:59:54 UTC 2016
New revision: 416403
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/416403

Log:
  Update to 3.1.0 and split agent, client and common files.

  This follows upstream way of distributing the package, and allows installing
  only the needed parts on a system.

  PR:		208546
  Submitted by:	myself
  Approved by:	maintainer stepped back

Changes:
  head/sysutils/Makefile
  head/sysutils/mcollective-nrpe-agent/Makefile
  head/sysutils/mcollective-nrpe-agent/distinfo
  head/sysutils/mcollective-nrpe-agent/pkg-descr
  head/sysutils/mcollective-nrpe-client/
  head/sysutils/mcollective-nrpe-client/Makefile
  head/sysutils/mcollective-nrpe-common/
  head/sysutils/mcollective-nrpe-common/Makefile
  head/sysutils/mcollective-nrpe-common/distinfo
  head/sysutils/mcollective-nrpe-common/pkg-descr
